testsuite.name: org.hyperledger.iroha.android.GradleHarnessTests
testsuite.system-out: [IrohaAndroid] Key manager attestation telemetry tests passed. [IrohaAndroid] Key manager deterministic export tests passed. [IrohaAndroid] Key manager validation telemetry tests passed. [IrohaAndroid] Key manager metadata tests passed. [IrohaAndroid] Key manager smoke tests passed. [IrohaAndroid] Account address tests passed. [IrohaAndroid] Canonical request signer tests passed. [IrohaAndroid] ClientConfig keystore telemetry tests passed. testsuite.system-err: 12月 31, 2025 1:14:30 午後 sun.net.httpserver.ExchangeImpl sendResponseHeaders 警告: sendResponseHeaders: rCode = 204: forcing contentLen = -1 [CudaAccelerators] Native CUDA backend disabled (set iroha.cuda.enableNative=true to enable). [CudaAccelerators] Native CUDA backend disabled (set iroha.cuda.enableNative=true to enable).
